name: Max & Lucy's
tagline: The chef is also your server — weekday-only, sells out daily, and the lemon bars are famous.
mustOrder: prime rib — when available, don't hesitate
lemon bars — famous for a reason, grab one before they're gone
parking: Street parking on Halekauwila St; Kakaako side streets
talkStory: The kind of place that only exists in Honolulu — the chef cooks your food and then walks it to your table himself. Weekday only (Mon–Fri, 5am–2pm), closed weekends. Items sell out daily — the popular plates go fast by noon. Home-style comfort food: kalbi, teriyaki salmon, fried chicken, lasagna. The lemon bars are an institution. This is a working person's lunch spot in Kakaako, zero tourist presence.
